Table sustainability.esg_report {
  esg_report_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the ESG report record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Annual ESG report is produced for each client organization; linking to account enables client‑level ESG compliance reporting.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: ESG report ownership requires linking the report to the employee who prepares it; standard ESG reporting process mandates a responsible preparer.']
  prior_esg_report_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on esg_report (prior_esg_report_id)']
  assurance_level varchar [note: 'Level of external assurance applied to the report (Limited, Reasonable, or None).']
  auditor_report_url varchar [note: 'Link to the detailed auditor verification report.']
  carbon_intensity decimal(10,3) [note: 'Carbon emissions per unit of revenue (tons CO₂e per million USD).']
  climate_risk_assessment_summary varchar [note: 'Brief summary of climate‑related risk analysis included in the report.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the ESG report record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_assessment varchar [note: 'Result of the data quality review for the ESG report.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system that supplied the ESG data (e.g., SAP S/4HANA, Intelex).']
  emission_reduction_target_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target percentage reduction in emissions relative to a baseline year.']
  emission_reduction_target_year varchar [note: 'Year by which the emission reduction target is to be achieved.']
  energy_consumption_mwh decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total energy consumed (megawatt‑hours) during the reporting period.']
  energy_intensity decimal(10,3) [note: 'Energy consumption per unit of production or revenue.']
  external_verifier varchar [note: 'Name of the third‑party organization that performed the assurance.']
  green_building_certifications varchar [note: 'List of green building certifications (e.g., LEED, BREEAM) referenced in the report.']
  net_zero_commitment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the net‑zero commitment.']
  net_zero_target_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year by which the organization aims to achieve net‑zero emissions.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for any supplemental information or comments.']
  publication_date date [note: 'Date the ESG report was publicly released or posted.']
  publication_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the ESG report.']
  regulatory_reporting_requirement varchar [note: 'Specific regulatory or statutory requirement that the ESG report satisfies.']
  renewable_energy_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Share of total energy consumption sourced from renewable resources, expressed as a percentage.']
  report_number varchar [note: 'External reference number or code assigned to the ESG report by the organization.']
  report_title varchar [note: 'Descriptive title of the ESG report as published.']
  report_url varchar [note: 'Web address where the ESG report can be accessed.']
  report_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the ESG report (e.g., v1.0, v2.1).']
  reporting_framework varchar [note: 'Framework or standard used for the ESG disclosure (e.g., GRI, TCFD, SASB, CDP, UN SDGs).']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'Last day of the reporting period covered by the ESG report.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'First day of the reporting period covered by the ESG report.']
  scope_boundary varchar [note: 'Boundary of emissions and sustainability data (Corporate, Project, or Both).']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the ESG report was submitted to the regulator or stakeholder.']
  sustainability_goals_aligned boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the report aligns with the company\'s defined sustainability goals.']
  total_emissions_scope1 decimal(15,3) [note: 'Direct greenhouse‑gas emissions (Scope 1) in metric tons CO₂e.']
  total_emissions_scope2 decimal(15,3) [note: 'Indirect emissions from purchased electricity, heat, or steam (Scope 2) in metric tons CO₂e.']
  total_emissions_scope3 decimal(15,3) [note: 'Other indirect emissions (Scope 3) in metric tons CO₂e.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the ESG report record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date the external verifier completed the assurance process.']
  waste_diverted_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of total waste that was recycled, composted, or otherwise diverted.']
  waste_diverted_tons decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total waste diverted from landfill (tons).']
  water_intensity decimal(10,3) [note: 'Water usage per unit of production or revenue.']
  water_usage_cubic_meters decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total water consumption during the reporting period (cubic meters).']

  Note: 'Master record for each formal ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) report published or submitted by the construction enterprise. Captures reporting framework (GRI, TCFD, SASB, CDP, UN SDGs), reporting period, scope boundaries (corporate vs. project-level), assurance level (limited/reasonable), external verifier, submission date, and publication status. SSOT for ESG disclosure obligations and stakeholder reporting.'
}

Table sustainability.esg_disclosure_item {
  esg_disclosure_item_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the ESG disclosure line item.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the asset (e.g., equipment, building) associated with the metric.']
  compliance_permit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.permit. Business justification: ESG disclosures must cite specific environmental permits and their status for regulatory compliance reporting.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Each disclosed ESG metric is owned by a staff member responsible for data collection and verification; linking provides audit traceability.']
  esg_report_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.esg_report. Business justification: Each ESG disclosure item belongs to a single ESG report; adding esg_report_id creates the parent‑child hierarchy and removes the need for separate report lookup fields.']
  related_project_construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project linked to this ESG disclosure.']
  restated_esg_disclosure_item_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on esg_disclosure_item (restated_esg_disclosure_item_id)']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the disclosure item was approved for reporting.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the individual who approved the disclosure.']
  assurance_level varchar [note: 'Level of assurance applied to the ESG data (e.g., limited assurance).']
  confidence_interval_high decimal(20,4) [note: 'Upper bound of the statistical confidence interval for the reported value.']
  confidence_interval_low decimal(20,4) [note: 'Lower bound of the statistical confidence interval for the reported value.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the disclosure record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code if the metric is monetary.']
  data_collection_method varchar [note: 'How the data was obtained (e.g., direct measurement, estimate).']
  data_quality_flag varchar [note: 'Assessment of the data quality for the disclosed metric.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the data relative to the organization.']
  emission_scope varchar [note: 'Scope of greenhouse‑gas emissions covered by the metric.']
  energy_source varchar [note: 'Primary energy source associated with the metric.']
  esg_disclosure_item_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the disclosure item.']
  framework varchar [note: 'The ESG reporting framework to which the indicator belongs.']
  indicator_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code of the ESG indicator as defined by the reporting framework.']
  indicator_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the ESG indicator.']
  is_key_metric boolean [note: 'True if the disclosure item is considered a key performance indicator for ESG reporting.']
  methodology varchar [note: 'Description of the calculation or measurement methodology used.']
  monetary_value decimal(20,4) [note: 'Monetary amount associated with the ESG metric, if applicable.']
  narrative_commentary varchar [note: 'Free‑text explanation or context for the disclosed metric.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any extra information relevant to the disclosure.']
  reported_value decimal(20,4) [note: 'Numeric value reported for the ESG indicator.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'End date of the reporting period covered by the disclosure.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Start date of the reporting period covered by the disclosure.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year for which the ESG data is reported.']
  responsible_party varchar [note: 'Name of the department or team accountable for the metric.']
  restated boolean [note: 'True if the disclosed value has been restated from a prior reporting period.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system or application that supplied the data (e.g., SAP S/4HANA, Intelex).']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit in which the reported value is expressed (e.g., tCO2e, kg, m3).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the disclosure record.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the disclosed data has been externally verified.']
  waste_type varchar [note: 'Category of waste measured (if applicable).']
  water_source varchar [note: 'Source of water consumption reported (e.g., municipal, well).']

  Note: 'Individual disclosure line item within an ESG report, mapping to a specific framework indicator or metric (e.g., GRI 305-1 Scope 1 emissions, GRI 306-3 waste generated). Captures indicator code, indicator name, reported value, unit of measure, data quality flag, restatement indicator, and narrative commentary. Enables granular traceability from ESG report to underlying data.'
}

Table sustainability.carbon_emission {
  carbon_emission_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each greenhouse gas emission measurement record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Clients require consolidated carbon‑footprint statements; associating emissions with the client account supports client‑level carbon accounting.']
  activity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to schedule.activity. Business justification: Carbon Emission Reporting requires mapping each emission record to the specific scheduled activity that generated it, enabling ESG reports and regulatory compliance.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to equipment.asset. Business justification: Regulatory GHG inventory requires attributing each emission record to the specific equipment that generated it for accurate reporting and optimization.']
  carbon_target_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.carbon_target. Business justification: Carbon emissions are measured against a specific reduction target; linking each emission to its carbon_target enables roll‑up of actual vs. target emissions.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project to which the emission belongs.']
  corrected_carbon_emission_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on carbon_emission (corrected_carbon_emission_id)']
  craft_worker_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.craft_worker. Business justification: Labor‑related carbon accounting attributes emissions to the individual worker operating equipment, required for detailed GHG reporting.']
  emission_factor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.emission_factor. Business justification: Carbon emission records use a standard emission factor; linking to the emission_factor master eliminates duplicated factor values and source strings.']
  emission_source_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the master record describing the specific emission source (e.g., a generator, vehicle, or process).']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Carbon emission logs are entered by a designated emissions officer; the employee ID ties the record to the responsible staff for compliance reporting.']
  permit_condition_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.permit_condition. Business justification: Emission tracking is required to verify adherence to permit‑condition limits imposed by regulators.']
  purchase_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to procurement.purchase_order. Business justification: Scope 3 carbon accounting requires linking each emission record to the specific purchase order that sourced the material, enabling accurate emissions attribution per procurement transaction.']
  site_mobilization_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to site.site_mobilization. Business justification: Regulatory ESG reporting requires associating each carbon emission record with the specific construction site (mobilization) for accurate site‑level carbon accounting.']
  activity_quantity decimal(18,4) [note: 'Measured amount of the activity (e.g., liters of fuel, kWh of electricity, tonnes of material).']
  activity_unit varchar [note: 'Unit associated with the activity_quantity.']
  co2e_tonnes decimal(18,6) [note: 'Calculated carbon dioxide equivalent emissions for the record, expressed in metric tonnes.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the emission record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_flag boolean [note: 'True if the emission data passed all quality checks; otherwise false.']
  event_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the emission measurement was recorded on site.']
  measurement_method varchar [note: 'Method used to obtain the activity data and emission factor.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations about the emission measurement.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'Last day of the reporting period to which this emission belongs.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'First day of the reporting period to which this emission belongs.']
  scope varchar [note: 'GHG accounting scope: Scope 1 (direct), Scope 2 (indirect electricity), Scope 3 (value chain).']
  source_category varchar [note: 'High‑level category of the emission source aligned with GHG Protocol definitions.']
  source_type varchar [note: 'Specific type of activity or equipment generating the emission.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who last modified the emission record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the emission record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date when the emission record was verified.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the emission record has been reviewed and approved.']
  verified_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the person/department that verified the emission record.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who created the emission record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of a greenhouse gas (GHG) emission measurement event for a construction project, site, or corporate entity. Captures emission source category (Scope 1 direct combustion, Scope 2 purchased electricity, Scope 3 supply chain/transport/waste), emission source type (diesel generator, concrete batching, fleet vehicle, grid electricity), activity data quantity, emission factor applied, calculated CO2e tonnes, and reporting period. Aligned with GHG Protocol and ISO 14064.'
}

Table sustainability.emission_factor {
  emission_factor_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the emission factor.']
  superseded_emission_factor_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on emission_factor (superseded_emission_factor_id)']
  applicable_fuel_category varchar [note: 'Category of fuel the factor applies to.']
  applicable_project_type varchar [note: 'Project categories where the factor is applicable.']
  applicable_sector varchar [note: 'Industry sector where the factor is relevant.']
  confidence_level varchar [note: 'Confidence level of the factor\'s accuracy.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the factor record was created.']
  data_quality_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Score indicating confidence in factor data (0‑100).']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which the factor is valid.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date until which the factor is valid; null if indefinite.']
  expiration_reason varchar [note: 'Reason why the factor expired or was deprecated.']
  factor_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the emission factor, e.g., \'Diesel Fuel CO2e Factor\'.']
  factor_precision varchar [note: 'Description of precision (e.g., number of significant digits).']
  factor_value decimal(12,6) [note: 'Numeric value of the emission factor.']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Type of fuel or material the factor applies to. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: diesel|gasoline|natural_gas|electricity|coal|biofuel|hydrogen — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  geographic_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic applicability of the factor.']
  gwp_basis varchar [note: 'GWP assessment basis used for the factor.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates if the factor is currently active for use.']
  is_deprecated boolean [note: 'Indicates if the factor is deprecated.']
  last_reviewed_date date [note: 'Date when the factor was last reviewed for accuracy.']
  measurement_method varchar [note: 'Method used to derive the factor.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text notes or comments about the factor.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country or region identifier.']
  regulatory_standard varchar [note: 'Regulation or standard that mandates use of this factor.']
  source varchar [note: 'Originating standard or organization providing the factor.']
  source_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the document or publication containing the factor.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit in which the factor value is expressed.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User or system that performed the last update.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the factor.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the factor record.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User or system that created the record.']

  Note: 'Reference master of GHG emission factors used to convert activity data into CO2e tonnes. Captures emission factor source (IPCC, DEFRA, EPA, national grid), fuel or material type, emission factor value, unit (kg CO2e per litre, per kWh, per tonne), global warming potential (GWP) basis (AR4/AR5/AR6), effective date range, and geographic applicability. Enables consistent and auditable carbon calculation across all projects.'
}

Table sustainability.carbon_target {
  carbon_target_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the carbon reduction target record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Clients set corporate carbon‑reduction targets; the target entity must be tied to the client account for performance tracking.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to equipment.asset. Business justification: Construction firms set asset‑level carbon reduction targets for heavy equipment to meet project net‑zero commitments.']
  superseded_carbon_target_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on carbon_target (superseded_carbon_target_id)']
  alignment_paris_pathway varchar [note: 'Alignment of the target with the 1.5 °C, 2 °C, or Net‑Zero pathways of the Paris Agreement.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date on which the target was formally approved.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the executive or committee that approved the target.']
  baseline_emissions_tco2e decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total greenhouse‑gas emissions in metric tonnes CO₂‑equivalent for the baseline year.']
  baseline_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year used as the reference point for emissions calculations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the carbon target record was first created in the system.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date on which the carbon target becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date on which the carbon target expires or is superseded (null for open‑ended).']
  interim_milestones varchar [note: 'JSON‑encoded list of intermediate milestones (year and reduction %) leading to the final target.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the target record.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations about the target.']
  sbti_validation_status varchar [note: 'Status of validation by the Science‑Based Targets initiative.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system (e.g., SAP S/4HANA, Procore) that supplied the target data.']
  target_code varchar [note: 'Human‑readable code or number used to reference the carbon target in reports and contracts.']
  target_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the carbon reduction commitment and its strategic context.']
  target_intensity_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the intensity‑based target.']
  target_intensity_value decimal(12,2) [note: 'Emissions intensity target (e.g., tCO₂e per unit of production) for intensity‑based targets.']
  target_reduction_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Desired percentage reduction of emissions relative to the baseline.']
  target_scope varchar [note: 'GHG accounting scope(s) covered by the target (Scope 1, 2, 3, or combinations).']
  target_type varchar [note: 'Category of the carbon reduction commitment (e.g., absolute reduction, intensity‑based, net‑zero, or Science‑Based Target).']
  target_units varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the target value (e.g., tCO₂e).']
  target_value_tco2e decimal(12,2) [note: 'Absolute emissions level to be reached by the target year, expressed in metric tonnes CO₂‑equivalent.']
  target_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year by which the reduction target must be achieved.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the carbon target record.']

  Note: 'Master record defining the organization\'s or a project\'s GHG reduction targets and net-zero commitments. Captures target type (absolute reduction, intensity-based, net-zero, science-based target), baseline year, baseline emissions (tCO2e), target year, target reduction percentage, SBTi validation status, interim milestones, and alignment with Paris Agreement pathways. SSOT for decarbonization commitments.'
}

Table sustainability.carbon_offset {
  carbon_offset_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each carbon offset transaction record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Clients purchase carbon offsets to meet net‑zero commitments; linking offsets to the client account records procurement per client.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to equipment.asset. Business justification: Offsets are allocated to specific equipment emissions to track offset usage against individual asset carbon footprints.']
  carbon_target_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.carbon_target. Business justification: Carbon offsets are applied to a reduction target; the FK allows tracking which offsets contribute to which target.']
  counterparty_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the external party (e.g., offset provider, broker) involved in the transaction.']
  retired_carbon_offset_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on carbon_offset (retired_carbon_offset_id)']
  carbon_offset_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the offset transaction.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance status of the offset transaction with ESG reporting requirements.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the carbon offset record was first created in the system.']
  credit_type varchar [note: 'Category of emission reduction activity represented by the credit.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three‑letter currency code of the purchase price.']
  esg_report_period varchar [note: 'Reporting period identifier (e.g., FY2023Q4) for which the offset is disclosed.']
  is_retired boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the offset credits have been retired (true) or are still active (false).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or additional information about the offset transaction.']
  offset_reference varchar [note: 'External reference number or code assigned to the carbon offset transaction by the issuing registry or internal system.']
  offset_standard varchar [note: 'Certification standard under which the offset credit is issued.']
  project_country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 country code where the offset project is located.']
  project_name varchar [note: 'Name of the project that generated the offset credits.']
  project_region varchar [note: 'State, province, or region within the project country.']
  purchase_price_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary amount paid for the offset credits, expressed in US dollars.']
  quantity_tco2e decimal(12,3) [note: 'Number of metric tonnes of CO₂ equivalent that were offset.']
  registry_name varchar [note: 'Name of the registry where the offset credit is recorded (e.g., Verra Registry).']
  registry_serial_number varchar [note: 'Unique serial number assigned by the registry to the specific offset credit.']
  retirement_date date [note: 'Date on which the offset credits were officially retired or applied.']
  retirement_reason varchar [note: 'Reason why the offset credits were retired.']
  transaction_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the offset purchase or retirement was executed.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the carbon offset record.']
  verification_body varchar [note: 'Organization that performed the verification of the offset credit.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date on which the offset credit was independently verified.']
  vintage_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year in which the offset project generated the credited emissions reductions.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of carbon offset credits purchased or retired by the construction enterprise to compensate for residual GHG emissions. Captures offset project name, offset standard (Gold Standard, VCS/Verra, ACR), credit type (reforestation, renewable energy, methane capture), vintage year, quantity (tCO2e), registry serial numbers, retirement date, and associated ESG report period. Supports net-zero accounting and disclosure.'
}

Table sustainability.waste_record {
  waste_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the waste record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Regulatory waste‑diversion reports are filed per client; linking waste records to the client account provides client‑wide waste compliance.']
  activity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to schedule.activity. Business justification: Waste Management process tracks waste generated by each construction activity, needed for waste diversion reporting and compliance.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to equipment.asset. Business justification: Waste generated by specific equipment (e.g., demolition) is recorded for waste diversion reporting and cost allocation.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'System identifier of the waste carrier.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project associated with the waste.']
  corrected_waste_record_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on waste_record (corrected_waste_record_id)']
  crew_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.crew. Business justification: Waste tracking reports assign waste generation to the crew that produced it, enabling crew‑level waste accountability.']
  disposal_facility_id varchar [note: 'System identifier of the disposal facility.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Waste tracking requires the site supervisor who records the waste event; linking enables waste audit and accountability.']
  site_mobilization_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to site.site_mobilization. Business justification: Waste tracking per site is needed for environmental permits and waste diversion targets; linking to site_mobilization provides the required site context.']
  cost_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary cost incurred for waste disposal or processing.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Internal cost‑center identifier used for financial allocation of waste disposal costs.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the waste record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 currency code for the disposal cost.']
  disposal_route varchar [note: 'Destination method for the waste after generation.']
  diversion_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of waste diverted from landfill to recycling/reuse.']
  epa_waste_code varchar [note: 'Regulatory code assigned by the EPA for the waste type.']
  event_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the waste was generated or recorded at the site.']
  hazardous_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the waste is classified as hazardous.']
  invoice_date date [note: 'Date on which the waste disposal invoice was issued.']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the invoice issued for waste disposal services.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional remarks or comments related to the waste record.']
  quantity decimal(12,3) [note: 'Measured amount of waste generated, expressed in the unit specified by unit_of_measure.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'Last day of the reporting period for which waste is recorded.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'First day of the reporting period for which waste is recorded.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit used for the quantity field (tonnes or cubic meters).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the waste record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date when the waste record was verified for accuracy.']
  verified_by varchar [note: 'Name of the employee or authority who verified the waste record.']
  waste_category varchar [note: 'Regulatory classification of the waste for handling and reporting.']
  waste_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description providing additional details about the waste.']
  waste_record_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable business identifier assigned to the waste record for tracking and reporting.']
  waste_record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the waste record.']
  waste_source varchar [note: 'Origin activity that produced the waste.']
  waste_stream_type varchar [note: 'Category of waste material (e.g., concrete rubble, steel scrap).']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing construction and demolition (C&D) waste generated at a project site during a reporting period. Captures waste stream type (concrete rubble, steel scrap, timber offcuts, hazardous waste, packaging), waste quantity (tonnes or m³), disposal route (landfill, recycling, reuse, energy recovery, incineration), waste carrier details, disposal facility, diversion rate achieved, and cost of disposal. Supports waste diversion KPI tracking and regulatory reporting.'
}

Table sustainability.waste_target {
  waste_target_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the waste target record.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project to which the waste target applies.']
  superseded_waste_target_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on waste_target (superseded_waste_target_id)']
  actual_diversion_rate_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Measured waste diversion rate achieved to date, expressed as a percentage.']
  actual_landfill_diversion_tonnes decimal(12,2) [note: 'Measured amount of waste actually diverted from landfill, in tonnes.']
  actual_waste_intensity_kg_per_million_revenue decimal(12,2) [note: 'Current waste intensity measured in kilograms per million pounds of revenue.']
  actual_waste_intensity_kg_per_sqm decimal(10,2) [note: 'Current waste intensity measured in kilograms per square meter.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who approved the waste target.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the waste target was approved for execution.']
  baseline_waste_intensity_kg_per_million_revenue decimal(12,2) [note: 'Current waste generation intensity baseline measured in kilograms per million pounds of revenue.']
  baseline_waste_intensity_kg_per_sqm decimal(10,2) [note: 'Current waste generation intensity baseline measured in kilograms per square meter of built area.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the waste target record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for any monetary amounts associated with the target.']
  end_date date [note: 'Date when the waste target expires or is completed; nullable for open‑ended targets.']
  is_public boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the waste target is publicly disclosed.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments regarding the waste target.']
  progress_status varchar [note: 'Current progress indicator relative to the waste target.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code representing the geographic region of the target.']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'How often waste performance against the target is reported.']
  start_date date [note: 'Date when the waste target becomes effective.']
  target_budget_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Financial budget allocated to achieve the waste target.']
  target_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the waste reduction target.']
  target_diversion_rate_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Committed waste diversion rate expressed as a percentage of total waste.']
  target_landfill_diversion_tonnes decimal(12,2) [note: 'Target amount of waste to be diverted from landfill, measured in tonnes.']
  target_period_years varchar [note: 'Number of years over which the waste target is planned to be achieved.']
  target_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the waste target strategy type.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the waste target record.']
  waste_management_strategy varchar [note: 'Strategic approach selected for achieving the waste target.']
  waste_target_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the waste target.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who initially created the waste target.']

  Note: 'Master record defining project-level or corporate waste reduction and diversion targets. Captures target diversion rate (%), target landfill diversion (tonnes), baseline waste intensity (kg per m² or per £M revenue), target period, waste management strategy type (zero waste to landfill, circular economy), and progress tracking status. Enables benchmarking of actual waste performance against commitments.'
}

Table sustainability.green_certification {
  green_certification_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the green certification record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Clients obtain green building certifications; linking certifications to the client account aggregates certifications per client.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project associated with this certification.']
  superseded_green_certification_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on green_certification (superseded_green_certification_id)']
  achieved_rating varchar [note: 'Rating actually awarded after assessment.']
  assessor_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the assessor for follow‑up communication.']
  assessor_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual or organization that performed the assessment.']
  carbon_reduction_amount decimal(12,3) [note: 'Quantified carbon emissions reduction attributed to the certification (in metric tonnes CO₂e).']
  carbon_reduction_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for carbon reduction (e.g., tCO2e).']
  certificate_number varchar [note: 'Official number assigned by the certification body to this certification.']
  certification_body varchar [note: 'Organization that issues the certification (e.g., USGBC for LEED).']
  certification_cost decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary cost incurred to obtain the certification.']
  certification_scheme varchar [note: 'Name of the green building certification scheme (e.g., LEED, BREEAM, WELL, Envision, CEEQUAL, Green Star, EDGE, SITES).']
  certification_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the certification.']
  cost_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the certification cost.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the certification record was first created in the system.']
  documentation_url varchar [note: 'Link to the digital copy of the certification documentation.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date the certification expires and must be renewed.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the certification.']
  rating_date date [note: 'Date on which the certification rating was granted.']
  registered_date date [note: 'Date the certification was officially registered with the certifying body.']
  sustainable_material_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Proportion of total material volume that is certified sustainable or recycled.']
  target_rating_level varchar [note: 'Desired rating level sought in the certification scheme (e.g., LEED Platinum, BREEAM Outstanding).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the certification record.']
  waste_diversion_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of construction waste diverted from landfill as a result of sustainable practices.']

  Note: 'Master record tracking green building and infrastructure certification pursuits and awards for construction projects. Covers certifications beyond LEED including BREEAM, WELL Building Standard, LEED v4.1, Envision (infrastructure), CEEQUAL, Green Star, EDGE, and SITES. Captures certification scheme, target rating level (e.g., BREEAM Outstanding, LEED Platinum), registered date, assessor details, achieved rating, certificate number, and expiry date.'
}

Table sustainability.green_credit {
  green_credit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the green credit record.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project to which this credit belongs.']
