  assessor_comment varchar [note: 'Comments provided by the assessor during evaluation.']
  award_date date [note: 'Date the credit was officially awarded.']
  certification_program varchar [note: 'Green building certification program under which the credit is evaluated.']
  certification_version varchar [note: 'Version of the certification program (e.g., "v4.1").']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance outcome for the credit.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the green credit record was first created.']
  credit_category varchar [note: 'Category of the credit within the sustainability assessment.']
  credit_code varchar [note: 'Business code or identifier for the credit (e.g., "EC‑01").']
  credit_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the green credit (e.g., "Optimized Energy Performance").']
  data_source_record_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the source record in the originating system.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Operational system where the original credit data originated.']
  evidence_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier or URL of the supporting evidence submitted for the credit.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the credit may no longer be valid (if applicable).']
  green_credit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the credit.']
  is_verified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the credit has been verified by an authorized party.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent review of the credit record.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes related to the credit.']
  points_achieved decimal(5,2) [note: 'Points actually earned after assessment.']
  points_max decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum points that can be earned for this credit.']
  points_targeted decimal(5,2) [note: 'Points the project aims to achieve for this credit.']
  region varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country code indicating the region of the project.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk assessment associated with achieving the credit.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the credit documentation was submitted to the certifying body.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last updated the record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  verification_method varchar [note: 'Method used to verify the credit evidence.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the record.']

  Note: 'Individual credit or category score record within a green building certification assessment. Captures credit category (energy, water, materials, transport, ecology, innovation), credit name, maximum available points, points targeted, points achieved, evidence reference, assessor comment, and credit status (targeted, submitted, awarded, not pursued). Enables granular tracking of certification credit attainment strategy.'
}

Table sustainability.sustainable_material {
  sustainable_material_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the sustainable material record.']
  document_register_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the Environmental Product Declaration document for the material.']
  superseded_sustainable_material_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on sustainable_material (superseded_sustainable_material_id)']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the supplier in the enterprise master data.']
  applicable_project_type varchar [note: 'Project categories for which the material is deemed suitable.']
  certification_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or URL to the certification document or registry entry.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance standing of the material with relevant environmental regulations.']
  cost_per_unit decimal(12,2) [note: 'Standard cost of the material per unit of measure.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the sustainable material record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the cost values.']
  date_approved date [note: 'Date when the material was approved for sustainable use.']
  date_deprecated date [note: 'Date when the material was removed from the sustainable material list.']
  density_kg_per_m3 decimal(12,4) [note: 'Physical density of the material, used for volume‑to‑weight conversions.']
  embodied_carbon_kg_per_kg decimal(12,4) [note: 'Carbon emissions associated with producing one kilogram of the material.']
  environmental_impact_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Composite score summarizing the material\'s overall environmental impact.']
  epd_url varchar [note: 'Web link to the EPD document providing detailed lifecycle data.']
  health_safety_rating varchar [note: 'Rating reflecting health and safety considerations of handling the material.']
  is_approved boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the material is currently approved for sustainable sourcing.']
  last_verified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the material\'s sustainability data was last validated.']
  lead_time_days varchar [note: 'Average procurement lead time for the material from order to delivery.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the material record within the sustainability program.']
  material_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the material based on sustainability characteristics.']
  material_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or catalogue code assigned to the material by the organization.']
  material_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the material as used in project specifications and procurement.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form remarks or comments about the material.']
  recycled_content_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of the material that consists of recycled content by weight.']
  regulatory_approval_number varchar [note: 'Official approval number issued by a governing body for the material.']
  renewable_energy_content_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Share of renewable energy used in the material\'s production process.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative risk rating associated with sourcing or using the material.']
  source_of_material varchar [note: 'Origin of the material in terms of raw or reclaimed content.']
  storage_requirements varchar [note: 'Special storage conditions required for the material (e.g., temperature, humidity).']
  supplier_country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the supplier\'s primary location.']
  supplier_name varchar [note: 'Name of the supplier providing the sustainable material.']
  sustainable_certification varchar [note: 'Certification indicating responsible sourcing or low‑carbon status.']
  sustainable_material_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the material, including typical applications and key properties.']
  total_embodied_carbon_kg decimal(12,4) [note: 'Total embodied carbon for the material quantity specified in the record.']
  transport_distance_km decimal(10,2) [note: 'Estimated distance the material travels from supplier to project site.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Primary mode of transportation used for delivering the material.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Standard unit used for ordering and reporting the material quantity.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the sustainable material record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the record to support change management and audit.']
  waste_diversion_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Portion of waste avoided by using this material instead of conventional alternatives.']

  Note: 'Master record for materials designated as sustainable or low-carbon within the approved material sourcing program. Captures material type, sustainability attribute (recycled content %, embodied carbon (kgCO2e/kg), responsibly sourced certification (FSC, PEFC, BES 6001), EPD (Environmental Product Declaration) reference, supplier origin, transport distance, and approved project applicability. SSOT for sustainable material sourcing decisions.'
}

Table sustainability.embodied_carbon_assessment {
  embodied_carbon_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each embodied carbon assessment record.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to equipment.asset. Business justification: Assessments of embodied carbon of equipment components need a direct link to the asset for lifecycle carbon accounting.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project to which the assessment applies.']
  prior_embodied_carbon_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on embodied_carbon_assessment (prior_embodied_carbon_assessment_id)']
  assessment_approval_date date [note: 'Date on which the assessment was formally approved.']
  assessment_approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the person who approved the assessment results.']
  assessment_author varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or team that performed the assessment.']
  assessment_code varchar [note: 'External reference code assigned to the assessment for tracking and reporting.']
  assessment_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations recorded by the assessor.']
  assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the assessment.']
  assessment_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the embodied carbon assessment was performed.']
  assessment_tool varchar [note: 'Software tool employed to calculate embodied carbon.']
  assessment_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the assessment methodology or data set.']
  benchmark_comparison varchar [note: 'Result of comparing the assessment\'s total carbon to the selected benchmark.']
  benchmark_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier for the benchmark against which the assessment is compared.']
  biogenic_carbon_tco2e decimal(12,3) [note: 'Carbon sequestered or emitted from biogenic materials, expressed in tCO2e.']
  carbon_boundary varchar [note: 'Scope of carbon accounting (e.g., cradle‑to‑gate).']
  carbon_intensity_kg_per_m3 decimal(10,3) [note: 'Carbon intensity per cubic metre of material, expressed in kilograms CO2e.']
  carbon_offset_used boolean [note: 'Indicates whether carbon offsets were applied to the assessment.']
  confidence_level varchar [note: 'Assessor’s confidence in the accuracy of the reported carbon values.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the assessment record was first created in the system.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system that supplied the assessment data.']
  end_of_life_carbon_tco2e decimal(12,3) [note: 'Embodied carbon for end‑of‑life stages (C1‑C4) of the life‑cycle.']
  is_verified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the assessment has been independently verified.']
  methodology varchar [note: 'Standard or custom methodology used for the carbon assessment.']
  offset_provider varchar [note: 'Name of the organization providing the carbon offsets.']
  offset_quantity_tco2e decimal(12,3) [note: 'Quantity of carbon offsets purchased, expressed in tCO2e.']
  operational_carbon_tco2e decimal(12,3) [note: 'Embodied carbon attributed to the operational phase (B6) of the life‑cycle.']
  regulatory_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'True if the assessment is included in mandatory ESG or regulatory reporting.']
  related_project_phase varchar [note: 'Project phase to which the assessment is most relevant.']
  renewable_material_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Proportion of materials sourced from renewable resources.']
  riba_stage varchar [note: 'RIBA stage of the project at which the assessment was conducted.']
  scope varchar [note: 'Greenhouse‑gas scope classification for the assessment.']
  total_embodied_carbon_tco2e decimal(12,3) [note: 'Aggregate embodied carbon for the project, expressed in metric tonnes of CO2 equivalent.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the assessment record.']
  upfront_carbon_tco2e decimal(12,3) [note: 'Embodied carbon associated with product stage (A1‑A5) of the life‑cycle.']
  verification_body varchar [note: 'Organization that performed the verification.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date on which verification was completed.']
  waste_diversion_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of construction waste diverted from landfill.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of an embodied carbon assessment conducted for a construction project or design package. Captures assessment stage (RIBA Stage 2/3/4/5/6/7 per RICS Whole Life Carbon Assessment), total embodied carbon (tCO2e), upfront carbon (A1-A5), operational carbon (B6), end-of-life carbon (C1-C4), biogenic carbon, assessment methodology (EN 15978, RICS WLCA), tool used (One Click LCA, Tally, EC3), and benchmark comparison.'
}

Table sustainability.energy_consumption {
  energy_consumption_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each energy consumption record.']
  activity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to schedule.activity. Business justification: Energy Consumption reporting ties energy use to scheduled activities to calculate activity‑level carbon intensity for ESG metrics.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to equipment.asset. Business justification: Energy (fuel) consumption is tracked per piece of equipment to calculate emissions intensity and improve efficiency.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the project associated with the energy consumption.']
  corrected_energy_consumption_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on energy_consumption (corrected_energy_consumption_id)']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Energy consumption data is entered by a facilities manager; linking provides traceability for energy‑efficiency initiatives.']
  site_mobilization_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to site.site_mobilization. Business justification: Energy consumption reporting is performed at the site level to meet sustainability KPIs and utility billing reconciliation.']
  carbon_emission_factor decimal(12,6) [note: 'Factor used to convert energy consumption to CO₂e emissions (kg CO₂e per unit).']
  carbon_emission_kg decimal(18,4) [note: 'Calculated carbon emissions for the consumption record in kilograms of CO₂e.']
  consumption_quantity decimal(18,4) [note: 'Measured amount of energy consumed during the reporting period.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the consumption record was first created in the system.']
  energy_consumption_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the consumption record.']
  energy_intensity decimal(12,4) [note: 'Energy consumption per unit of output (e.g., kWh per square meter) for benchmarking.']
  energy_type varchar [note: 'Category of energy consumed (e.g., diesel, electricity, natural gas, LPG, renewable, other).']
  is_estimated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the consumption value is an estimate (true) or a measured value (false).']
  measurement_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the energy consumption measurement was recorded.']
  meter_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the meter or measurement device that captured the consumption.']
  metering_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the measurement data: smart meter, fuel dip, invoice, or manual entry.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for any supplemental information or comments about the consumption entry.']
  period_end_date date [note: 'Last day of the reporting period for which consumption is aggregated.']
  period_start_date date [note: 'First day of the reporting period for which consumption is aggregated.']
  recorded_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user or system that entered the consumption record.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit in which the consumption quantity is expressed (e.g., kWh, MWh, GJ, litre).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the consumption record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of energy consumption measured at a construction site, office, or plant facility during a reporting period. Captures energy type (diesel, grid electricity, natural gas, LPG, renewable on-site generation), consumption quantity, unit (litres, kWh, GJ), metering source (smart meter, fuel dip, invoice), site or facility reference, and reporting period. Feeds Scope 1 and Scope 2 carbon calculations and energy intensity benchmarking.'
}

Table sustainability.water_consumption {
  water_consumption_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each water consumption record.']
  activity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to schedule.activity. Business justification: Water usage is monitored per construction activity to satisfy environmental permits and sustainability reporting.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the construction project associated with the water consumption.']
  corrected_water_consumption_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on water_consumption (corrected_water_consumption_id)']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Water usage readings are logged by a field engineer; associating the employee supports regulatory water‑use reporting.']
  site_mobilization_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to site.site_mobilization. Business justification: Water usage must be tracked per construction site for compliance with local water‑use regulations and project sustainability goals.']
  carbon_footprint_kg decimal(12,3) [note: 'Estimated greenhouse‑gas emissions associated with the water consumption, expressed in kilograms of CO₂ equivalent.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for additional notes or observations about the measurement.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the water usage complies with applicable ESG or regulatory requirements.']
  consumption_volume_m3 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total volume of water consumed during the reporting period, measured in cubic metres.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the water consumption record was first created in the system.']
  discharge_destination varchar [note: 'Where the discharged water is sent (e.g., municipal sewer, natural watercourse, on‑site treatment, reuse).']
  discharge_volume_m3 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Volume of water discharged from the site after use, measured in cubic metres.']
  metering_method varchar [note: 'Method used to capture the water consumption reading.']
  reading_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the water consumption measurement was recorded.']
  recorded_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee or system that recorded the water consumption measurement.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'Last day of the reporting period for which consumption is measured.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'First day of the reporting period for which consumption is measured.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the water consumption record.']
  water_source_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the water source used (e.g., mains supply, borehole, recycled/harvested rainwater, grey water reuse).']
  water_stress_area_classification varchar [note: 'Classification of the geographic area based on water scarcity risk.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of water consumption at a construction site or facility during a reporting period. Captures water source type (mains supply, borehole, recycled/harvested rainwater, grey water reuse), consumption volume (m³), metering method, discharge volume, discharge destination (sewer, watercourse, on-site treatment), and water stress area classification. Supports water stewardship reporting and CDP Water disclosure.'
}

Table sustainability.climate_risk_assessment {
  climate_risk_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the climate risk assessment record.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project to which the assessment applies.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal team or external stakeholder accountable for the assessment.']
  prior_climate_risk_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on climate_risk_assessment (prior_climate_risk_assessment_id)']
  adaptation_measure varchar [note: 'Planned actions to reduce exposure or vulnerability to the identified climate risk.']
  assessment_code varchar [note: 'External reference code used in reporting and regulatory filings.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date on which the climate risk assessment was formally completed.']
  assessment_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or title of the climate risk assessment.']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'Category of climate risk assessment: physical risk, transition risk, or opportunity.']
  climate_risk_assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current workflow state of the assessment.']
  climate_scenario varchar [note: 'Climate scenario applied in the assessment, based on IPCC RCP pathways or IEA Net‑Zero Emissions scenario.']
  confidence_level varchar [note: 'Qualitative confidence in the underlying data and assumptions.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the assessment record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three‑letter code of the currency used for the financial impact estimate.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the data used in the assessment.']
  emission_factor decimal(10,4) [note: 'Estimated CO₂e emission factor (tCO₂e per unit) used in scenario calculations.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the assessment is considered outdated and must be refreshed.']
  financial_impact_estimate decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary estimate of the potential loss or cost associated with the risk, expressed in the reporting currency.']
  is_strategic_priority boolean [note: 'True if the assessed risk is identified as a strategic priority for the organization.']
  likelihood varchar [note: 'Estimated probability of the risk materialising, expressed on a qualitative scale.']
  mitigation_action varchar [note: 'Initiatives aimed at lowering greenhouse‑gas emissions or aligning with transition pathways.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments, observations, or caveats from the assessor.']
  portfolio_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the portfolio grouping multiple projects for aggregated risk analysis.']
  region varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country/region code where the assessed asset is located.']
  regulatory_change_indicator boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether emerging regulations materially affect the assessed risk.']
  review_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next periodic review of the assessment.']
  risk_category varchar [note: 'Primary climate‑related risk category evaluated in the assessment.']
  risk_subcategory varchar [note: 'More detailed classification within the main risk category (e.g., riverine flooding, coastal flooding).']
  sea_level_rise_estimate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Projected sea‑level increase (meters) relevant to flood risk calculations.']
  temperature_increase_estimate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Projected average temperature rise (°C) over the selected time horizon.']
  time_horizon varchar [note: 'Planning horizon for the assessment: short (0‑5 years), medium (5‑15 years), or long term (15+ years).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the assessment record.']

  Note: 'Master record for a formal climate-related risk and opportunity assessment conducted at project, portfolio, or corporate level. Captures assessment type (physical risk, transition risk, opportunity), climate scenario used (IPCC RCP 2.6/4.5/8.5, IEA NZE), time horizon (short/medium/long-term), risk category (flooding, extreme heat, water scarcity, carbon pricing, stranded assets, regulatory change), likelihood, financial impact estimate, and adaptation measures. Aligned with TCFD recommendations.'
}

Table sustainability.climate_risk_item {
  climate_risk_item_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the climate risk or opportunity line item.']
  affected_asset_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the physical or digital asset impacted by the climate risk.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project where the risk materializes.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal party responsible for managing the risk.']
  parent_climate_risk_item_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on climate_risk_item (parent_climate_risk_item_id)']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date on which the risk was initially evaluated.']
  climate_risk_item_status varchar [note: 'Overall lifecycle status of the climate risk item.']
  climate_scenario varchar [note: 'TCFD scenario used for the risk analysis: baseline, adverse, or severe.']
  climate_year varchar [note: 'Target year for the climate scenario (e.g., 2025, 2030).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the risk item record was first created in the system.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date from which the risk assessment is considered valid.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date after which the risk assessment is no longer applicable (nullable).']
  exposure_level varchar [note: 'Overall magnitude classification of the financial exposure.']
  financial_exposure_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary value of the potential loss or gain associated with the risk, in the specified currency.']
  financial_exposure_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency for the financial exposure amount. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: USD|EUR|GBP|JPY|CAD|AUD|CHF|CNY|INR|BRL|ZAR|KRW — promote to reference product]']
  mitigation_action varchar [note: 'Planned or executed action(s) to reduce the likelihood or impact of the risk.']
  mitigation_status varchar [note: 'Current state of the mitigation effort.']
  probability_rating varchar [note: 'Likelihood of the risk occurring, expressed on a qualitative scale.']
  regulatory_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the risk must be disclosed in regulatory or ESG reports.']
  residual_risk_rating varchar [note: 'Risk rating after planned mitigation actions have been applied.']
  risk_assessment_methodology varchar [note: 'Name or reference of the methodology used to assess the climate risk (e.g., TCFD, ISO 14064).']
  risk_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the nature, cause, and potential impact of the climate risk or opportunity.']
  risk_name varchar [note: 'Short descriptive name of the climate risk or opportunity.']
  risk_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the line item represents a risk (negative) or an opportunity (positive).']
  tcfd_category varchar [note: 'TCFD classification of the risk: physical acute, physical chronic, transition policy, transition market, or transition technology.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the risk item record.']

  Note: 'Individual climate risk or opportunity line item within a climate risk assessment. Captures risk/opportunity identifier, TCFD category (physical acute, physical chronic, transition policy, transition market, transition technology), description, affected asset or project, probability rating, financial exposure (low/medium/high or quantified £), residual risk after adaptation, and owner. Enables granular TCFD scenario analysis disclosure.'
}

Table sustainability.sustainability_plan {
  sustainability_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sustainability plan.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Clients develop corporate sustainability plans; the FK ties each plan to the owning client account.']
  assessment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_assessment. Business justification: Plans are drafted based on findings of compliance assessments to address identified gaps.']
  manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to hr.employee. Business justification: Each sustainability plan is owned by a designated manager; the manager employee ID replaces the free‑text manager field for governance.']
  superseded_sustainability_plan_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on sustainability_plan (superseded_sustainability_plan_id)']
  applicable_standards varchar [note: 'Standards and frameworks applicable to the plan. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: ISO 14001|ISO 26000|ISO 50001|ISO 45001|LEED|GRESB — promote to reference product]']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Approval workflow status of the plan.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or authority who approved the plan.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the plan was approved.']
  budget_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Allocated budget for sustainability initiatives under the plan.']
  carbon_reduction_target_tonnes decimal(12,3) [note: 'Target amount of CO2 equivalent emissions reduction.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional free-text comments or notes.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the plan record was created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO currency code for budget amounts.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'Origin of data used for plan metrics.']
  document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the stored plan document.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the sustainability plan becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the sustainability plan expires or is superseded.']
  funding_source varchar [note: 'Source of funding for the sustainability plan.']
  green_building_certifications varchar [note: 'List of green building certifications pursued or achieved. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: LEED|BREEAM|WELL|Living Building Challenge|DGNB|HQE — promote to reference product]']
  is_public boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the plan is publicly disclosed.']
  mitigation_measures varchar [note: 'Planned actions to mitigate identified risks.']
  monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which sustainability metrics are monitored.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next plan review.']
  plan_category varchar [note: 'Higher-level classification of the plan scope.']
  plan_code varchar [note: 'External reference code for the sustainability plan as used in contracts and reporting.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the sustainability plan.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Category of the sustainability plan indicating its primary focus.']
  renewable_energy_target_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target percentage of energy sourced from renewable sources.']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency of formal sustainability reporting.']
  responsible_department varchar [note: 'Department overseeing the sustainability plan.']
  review_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the plan is reviewed for relevance and compliance.']
  risk_assessment varchar [note: 'Summary of identified risks related to plan implementation.']
  stakeholder_engagement_plan varchar [note: 'Description of how stakeholders will be engaged and consulted.']
  sustainability_plan_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the plan.']
  target_year varchar [note: 'Fiscal or calendar year for which the plan\'s targets are set.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the plan record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date when verification was completed.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Status of third-party verification of plan metrics.']
  verified_by varchar [note: 'Entity or auditor that performed verification.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version number of the sustainability plan document.']
  waste_diversion_target_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target percentage of waste diverted from landfill.']
  water_use_reduction_target_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target percentage reduction in water consumption.']

  Note: 'Master record for a project-level or corporate sustainability management plan defining the environmental and social commitments, targets, and management measures for a construction project. Captures plan type (project sustainability plan, environmental management plan, social value plan), applicable standards (ISO 14001, ISO 26000), key commitments, responsible manager, approval status, and review schedule. SSOT for project sustainability governance.'
}

Table sustainability.sustainability_action {
  sustainability_action_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the sustainability action record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Clients execute sustainability actions (e.g., energy retrofits); linking actions to the client account records actions per client.']
  activity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to schedule.activity. Business justification: Sustainability actions (e.g., waste reduction) are assigned to specific scheduled activities for execution tracking and impact measurement.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to equipment.asset. Business justification: Actions such as retrofitting or low‑emission upgrades are tied to the equipment being modified for traceability.']
  compliance_action_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_action. Business justification: Sustainability actions frequently originate from corrective compliance actions; the link tracks that lineage.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal or external party accountable for executing the action.']
  instruction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to site.site_instruction. Business justification: Sustainability actions are often initiated by site instructions; linking provides traceability from instruction to action for audit and reporting.']
  parent_sustainability_action_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on sustainability_action (parent_sustainability_action_id)']
  regulatory_obligation_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the regulatory or internal compliance requirement that drives the action.']
  related_project_construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project associated with the action.']
  sustainability_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.sustainability_plan. Business justification: Sustainability actions are defined within a sustainability plan; linking actions to their plan provides hierarchy and enables plan‑level reporting.']
  workforce_crew_assignment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.crew_assignment. Business justification: Sustainability actions (e.g., recycling program) are often assigned to specific crew assignments; tracking this link supports action audit trails.']
  action_code varchar [note: 'External business identifier or code assigned to the sustainability action.']
  action_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the sustainability action was initially recorded or logged.']
  actual_completion_date date [note: 'Date when the action was actually finished.']
  actual_start_date date [note: 'Date when the action actually began.']
  carbon_intensity decimal(12,6) [note: 'Carbon intensity metric associated with the action, if applicable.']
  carbon_reduction_tonnes decimal(12,3) [note: 'Estimated or measured amount of CO2e reduced as a result of the action.']
  cost_saving_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary cost savings achieved by the action.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the cost saving amount.']
  energy_consumption_mwh decimal(12,3) [note: 'Energy consumption impact (reduction or increase) associated with the action.']
  evidence_url varchar [note: 'Link to documentation, photos, or reports that verify completion of the action.']
  is_regulatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the action is mandated by a regulation (true) or voluntary (false).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the action.']
  origin varchar [note: 'Source that triggered the creation of the sustainability action.']
  planned_completion_date date [note: 'Target date by which the action should be completed.']
  planned_start_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the action to commence.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the action.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Governing authority or standard that requires the action.']
  responsible_party_role varchar [note: 'Role or function of the responsible party within the organization.']
  risk_assessment varchar [note: 'Risk level assigned to the action based on potential impact or failure.']
  sustainability_action_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the sustainability action into a primary focus area.']
  sustainability_action_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the purpose, scope, and expected outcomes of the action.']
  sustainability_action_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the sustainability action.']
  title varchar [note: 'Short descriptive title of the sustainability initiative or corrective action.']
  waste_diverted_tons decimal(12,3) [note: 'Quantity of waste material diverted from landfill as a result of the action.']
  water_usage_cubic_meters decimal(12,3) [note: 'Volume of water saved or consumed due to the action.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of a specific sustainability initiative or corrective action committed to within a sustainability plan or arising from an audit, assessment, or regulatory obligation. Captures action title, action category (carbon reduction, waste diversion, biodiversity, social value, energy efficiency), responsible party, planned completion date, actual completion date, status (open/in-progress/closed/overdue), evidence of completion, and carbon/cost saving achieved.'
}

Table sustainability.biodiversity_assessment {
  biodiversity_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for each biodiversity assessment record.']
  baseline_biodiversity_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on biodiversity_assessment (baseline_biodiversity_assessment_id)']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project associated with the assessment.']
  site_construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the site/location where the assessment was performed.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when statutory approval was granted.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the authority or person who approved the assessment.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date when the assessment was conducted.']
  assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current workflow status of the assessment.']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'The type of biodiversity assessment performed.']
  baseline_habitat_condition varchar [note: 'Description of habitat condition before construction.']
  biodiversity_units_gained decimal(12,4) [note: 'Number of biodiversity units gained as a result of mitigation.']
  biodiversity_units_lost decimal(12,4) [note: 'Number of biodiversity units lost due to project impacts.']
  biodiversity_units_per_ha decimal(12,4) [note: 'Biodiversity units calculated per hectare of habitat.']
  climate_risk_assessment boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a climate risk assessment was performed.']
  compliance_requirements_met varchar [note: 'Whether all statutory biodiversity compliance requirements were met.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first created.']
  data_quality_flag varchar [note: 'Indicator of the overall data quality for this assessment.']
  data_source varchar [note: 'System or organization that provided the raw assessment data.']
  external_reference_code varchar [note: 'Identifier linking to external regulatory or reporting system.']
  green_building_certification varchar [note: 'Applicable green building certification(s) for the project.']
  habitat_area_ha decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total area of the habitat in hectares.']
  habitat_quality_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score representing habitat quality (e.g., 0‑1 scale).']
  measurement_method varchar [note: 'Methodology or protocol used to quantify biodiversity units.']
  metric_framework varchar [note: 'Framework used for calculating biodiversity units.']
  mitigation_hierarchy_applied varchar [note: 'Description of mitigation steps applied (avoid, minimise, restore, offset).']
  monitoring_end_date date [note: 'Planned end date for biodiversity monitoring.']
  monitoring_plan_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if a post‑construction biodiversity monitoring plan is required.']
  monitoring_start_date date [note: 'Planned start date for biodiversity monitoring.']
  monitoring_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the biodiversity monitoring program.']
  net_biodiversity_units decimal(12,4) [note: 'Net biodiversity units (gained minus lost).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional comments or observations.']
  post_construction_habitat_condition varchar [note: 'Description of habitat condition after construction.']
  protected_species_identified varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of protected species found on site.']
  review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent internal review.']
  reviewer varchar [note: 'Name of the person who performed the latest review.']
  risk_assessment_summary varchar [note: 'Brief summary of identified environmental risks.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source operational system that supplied the data.']
  statutory_approval_status varchar [note: 'Regulatory approval status for the assessment.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User or system that performed the last update.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date when verification was completed.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Whether the assessment data has been independently verified.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User or system that created the record.']

  Note: 'Master record for a biodiversity net gain (BNG) or ecological impact assessment conducted for a construction project. Captures assessment type (Biodiversity Net Gain, Ecological Impact Assessment, Habitat Survey), baseline habitat condition (pre-construction), post-construction habitat condition, biodiversity units gained or lost (per UK BNG metric or TNFD framework), protected species identified, mitigation hierarchy applied, and statutory approval status.'
}

Table sustainability.social_value_record {
  social_value_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the social value record.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project associated with this social value outcome.']
  corrected_social_value_record_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on social_value_record (corrected_social_value_record_id)']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the social value record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the monetised value.']
  data_quality_flag varchar [note: 'Indicator of the overall data quality assessment for this record.']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the quantity delivered (e.g., people, hours, dollars, percent, units).']
  monetised_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary valuation of the social value outcome expressed in the specified currency.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or additional information about the social value record.']
  outcome_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the social value outcome delivered.']
  quantity_delivered decimal(18,4) [note: 'Numeric amount of the social value delivered expressed in the measurement unit.']
  record_code varchar [note: 'Human‑readable business identifier for the social value record, used in reporting and client communications.']
  recorded_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the social value outcome was recorded or observed.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'End date of the reporting period for which the social value is measured.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Start date of the reporting period for which the social value is measured.']
  social_value_record_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the social value outcome (e.g., local employment, apprenticeships, SME spend, community investment, skills training, supply chain diversity).']
  social_value_record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the social value record.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system that supplied the social value data.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent update to the social value record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date on which verification of the social value outcome was completed.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the social value outcome has been verified, and its verification state.']
  verified_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the person or entity that performed verification.']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing social value outcomes delivered by a construction project or corporate program. Captures social value category (local employment, apprenticeships, SME spend, community investment, skills training, supply chain diversity), outcome description, measurement unit, quantity delivered, monetised social value (£ using TOMS or HACT framework), reporting period, and project reference. Supports PPN 06/20 social value reporting and client commitments.'
}

Table sustainability.supply_chain_carbon {
  supply_chain_carbon_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the supply chain carbon record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Supply‑chain Scope 3 emissions are reported at the client level; the FK ties emissions data to the owning client account.']
  agreement_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the contract under which the supplier activity was performed.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project associated with the carbon data.']
  corrected_supply_chain_carbon_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on supply_chain_carbon (corrected_supply_chain_carbon_id)']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'System identifier for the supplier entity.']
  activity_quantity decimal(18,4) [note: 'Quantity of the activity (e.g., tonnes of material, kilometres travelled, kWh consumed).']
  activity_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the activity quantity.']
  carbon_intensity decimal(18,6) [note: 'Calculated carbon intensity expressed as tonnes CO₂e per monetary unit of spend.']
  collection_method varchar [note: 'Method used to collect the carbon data from the supplier.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the spend amount.']
  data_quality_tier varchar [note: 'Quality tier of the carbon data (primary measured, secondary spend‑based, or industry average).']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Operational system that supplied the carbon data.']
  emission_factor decimal(18,6) [note: 'GHG emission factor applied to the activity (tCO2e per unit).']
  emission_factor_source varchar [note: 'Source of the emission factor (e.g., EPA, IPCC, GHG Protocol, or custom).']
  emission_factor_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the emission factor used for calculation.']
  geographic_region varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country code representing the region where the activity occurred.']
  material_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the material or service (e.g., steel, concrete, transport).']
  measurement_method varchar [note: 'Method used to obtain activity data (direct measurement, estimate, or model).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations about the carbon data.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'End date of the reporting period for the carbon data.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Start date of the reporting period for the carbon data.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year in which the reporting period falls.']
  scope3_tco2e decimal(18,6) [note: 'Calculated Scope 3 greenhouse gas emissions in metric tonnes of CO₂e for the record.']
  spend_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total monetary spend with the supplier for the reported period, in the transaction currency.']
  supplier_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the supplier providing the material or service.']
  supply_chain_carbon_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the carbon record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date on which verification was completed.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Status of third‑party verification of the carbon data.']
  verified_by varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or organization that performed verification.']

  Note: 'Transactional record capturing Scope 3 supply chain carbon data collected from vendors, subcontractors, and material suppliers. Captures supplier name, material or service category, spend (£), activity data (tonnes, km, kWh), emission factor source, calculated Scope 3 tCO2e, data quality tier (primary measured, secondary spend-based, industry average), collection method (supplier questionnaire, EPD, spend-based), and reporting period. Supports GHG Protocol Scope 3 Category 1 and 4 disclosure.'
}

Table sustainability.sustainability_audit {
  sustainability_audit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the sustainability audit record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Clients undergo sustainability audits; associating the audit record with the client account enables audit history per client.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project to which the audit applies.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'System identifier of the auditor or audit firm responsible for the audit.']
  follow_up_sustainability_audit_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on sustainability_audit (follow_up_sustainability_audit_id)']
  iso_audit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.iso_audit. Business justification: Sustainability audits reference ISO audit outcomes to verify integrated management system compliance.']
  site_construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the physical site or location covered by the audit.']
  audit_date date [note: 'Calendar date on which the audit was conducted or formally closed.']
  audit_number varchar [note: 'External audit reference number assigned by the audit management system.']
  audit_scope varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the audit\'s functional, geographic, and project scope.']
  audit_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the audit is performed internally, by an external party, for a client, or by a third‑party auditor.']
  auditor_contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for the auditor.']
  auditor_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the auditor or audit firm.']
  auditor_organization varchar [note: 'Name of the organization or firm performing the audit.']
  carbon_emission_tonnes decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total greenhouse‑gas emissions measured in carbon‑dioxide‑equivalent tonnes.']
  certification_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to any ISO 14001 or other sustainability certification linked to the audit.']
  climate_risk_assessment_summary varchar [note: 'Brief summary of climate‑related risk findings identified during the audit.']
  compliance_rating varchar [note: 'Overall compliance assessment result of the audit.']
  corrective_action_plan_reference varchar [note: 'Reference code or identifier for the corrective action plan linked to this audit.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the audit record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_flag varchar [note: 'Indicates the assessed quality of the audit data.']
  end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date‑time when the audit fieldwork concluded.']
  energy_consumption_mwh decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total electricity or fuel energy consumed, expressed in megawatt‑hours.']
  findings_major varchar [note: 'Count of findings classified as major non‑conformities.']
  findings_minor varchar [note: 'Count of findings classified as minor non‑conformities.']
  findings_observation varchar [note: 'Count of observations (non‑conformities without corrective requirement).']
  findings_opportunity varchar [note: 'Count of improvement opportunities identified during the audit.']
  findings_total varchar [note: 'Total number of audit findings recorded.']
  green_building_certification varchar [note: 'Indicates any green building certification achieved for the project.']
  net_zero_commitment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the entity\'s net‑zero emissions commitment.']
  net_zero_target_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year by which net‑zero emissions are targeted.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes captured by the auditor.']
  overall_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score (0‑100) summarising overall compliance performance.']
  regulatory_reporting_requirement varchar [note: 'Regulatory reporting obligations applicable to the audit (e.g., OSHA, EPA).']
  review_date date [note: 'Date on which the audit findings were formally reviewed.']
  reviewed_by varchar [note: 'Name of the internal reviewer who validated the audit outcomes.']
  start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date‑time when the audit fieldwork began.']
  sustainability_audit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the audit record.']
  sustainability_goals_aligned boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the audited entity aligns with corporate sustainability goals.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the audit record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date on which the audit was externally verified.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Status of external verification of the audit results.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version number of the audit record, incremented on each revision.']
  waste_diversion_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of waste diverted from landfill during the audit period.']
  water_usage_cubic_meters decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total volume of water consumed on the audited site.']

  Note: 'Formal sustainability audit record assessing a project\'s or corporate entity\'s compliance with its sustainability plan, ISO 14001 EMS, and contractual sustainability commitments. Captures audit type (internal, external, client, third-party), audit scope, auditor details, audit date, findings count by severity (major NC, minor NC, observation, opportunity), overall compliance rating, and corrective action plan reference. Distinct from quality and safety audits.'
}

Table sustainability.env_incident {
  env_incident_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the environmental incident record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Environmental incidents are reported to regulators per client; linking incidents to the client account supports incident tracking per client.']
  compliance_permit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.permit. Business justification: Environmental incidents are often triggered by permit breaches; linking enables root‑cause analysis and reporting.']
  construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the project associated with the incident.']
  craft_worker_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.craft_worker. Business justification: Required for HSE incident reports to record the worker responsible for the incident, a standard safety investigation practice.']
  firm_profile_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the contractor or party responsible for the work area.']
  root_cause_env_incident_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on env_incident (root_cause_env_incident_id)']
  site_mobilization_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to site.site_mobilization. Business justification: Environmental incident logs are required to reference the exact site where the incident occurred for regulatory notification and corrective action.']
  closure_date date [note: 'Date when the incident was formally closed after all actions completed.']
  corrective_action_plan varchar [note: 'Planned actions to prevent recurrence of similar incidents.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the incident record was first created in the system.']
  env_incident_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of what happened, including context and observations.']
  env_incident_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the incident record.']
  estimated_impact_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Quantified estimate of environmental impact (e.g., volume spilled).']
  follow_up_actions varchar [note: 'Planned follow‑up activities after initial response.']
  immediate_response_actions varchar [note: 'Actions taken immediately after the incident to contain or mitigate impact.']
  impact_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary impact, if applicable.']
  impact_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the estimated impact amount.']
  incident_number varchar [note: 'Business-visible identifier or ticket number assigned to the incident.']
  incident_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the incident occurred.']
  incident_type varchar [note: 'Category of environmental incident (e.g., spill, pollution, dust exceedance).']
  is_near_miss boolean [note: 'True if the event was a near‑miss (no actual impact) but could have caused an incident.']
  latitude double [note: 'Geographic latitude of the incident location.']
  lessons_learned varchar [note: 'Key learnings captured from the incident handling process.']
  longitude double [note: 'Geographic longitude of the incident location.']
  media_affected varchar [note: 'Environmental media impacted by the incident.']
  mitigation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of mitigation actions for the incident.']
  notification_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory authority was notified.']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory body notified (e.g., EPA, OSHA).']
  regulatory_notification_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the incident must be reported to a regulatory authority.']
  reported_by_contact varchar [note: 'Email address of the reporter for follow‑up communication.']
  reported_by_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the person who reported the incident.']
  root_cause varchar [note: 'Underlying cause identified for the incident.']
  severity_category varchar [note: 'Severity classification of the incident on a scale of 1 (most severe) to 4 (least severe).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the incident record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of an environmental incident or near-miss event occurring on a construction site or at a corporate facility. Captures incident type (spill, pollution, dust exceedance, noise complaint, protected species disturbance, unauthorized discharge), severity classification (Category 1-4), affected media (land, water, air), regulatory notification requirement, immediate response actions taken, root cause, and regulatory authority notified. Distinct from safety.incident which covers HSE personal safety events.'
}

Table sustainability.carbon_reduction_initiative {
  carbon_reduction_initiative_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each carbon reduction initiative.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to client.account. Business justification: Clients sponsor carbon‑reduction initiatives; the FK captures which client is responsible for each initiative.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of a major asset (e.g., equipment, building) impacted by the initiative.']
  carbon_target_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.carbon_target. Business justification: Carbon reduction initiatives are created to achieve a specific carbon reduction target; adding carbon_target_id creates a direct parent relationship and eliminates the need for ad‑hoc lookups.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the party (person or team) accountable for delivering the initiative.']
  parent_carbon_reduction_initiative_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on carbon_reduction_initiative (parent_carbon_reduction_initiative_id)']
  related_project_construction_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the construction project to which the initiative is linked.']
  actual_co2e_saving decimal(12,3) [note: 'Measured annual carbon dioxide equivalent reduction achieved, expressed in metric tonnes.']
  actual_cost decimal(15,2) [note: 'Actual amount spent to implement the initiative.']
  actual_cost_currency varchar [note: 'Currency of the actual cost amount.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or authority that approved the initiative.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the initiative received formal approval.']
  carbon_reduction_initiative_description varchar [note: 'Detailed free‑text description of the initiative\'s objectives, scope, and approach.']
  carbon_reduction_initiative_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the carbon reduction initiative.']
  carbon_reduction_initiative_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the initiative.']
  carbon_reduction_methodology varchar [note: 'Methodology or standard used to calculate carbon reductions (e.g., PAS 2080, ISO 14064).']
  climate_risk_category varchar [note: 'Categorisation of climate‑related risk exposure for the initiative.']
  compliance_standard varchar [note: 'Applicable environmental or sustainability standard governing the initiative.']
  cost_currency varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the implementation cost.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the initiative record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_flag varchar [note: 'Indicator of the confidence level in the reported data.']
  end_date date [note: 'Planned or actual completion date of the initiative.']
  funding_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount of funding allocated to the initiative.']
  funding_currency varchar [note: 'Currency of the funding amount.']
  funding_source varchar [note: 'Origin of the funds used for the initiative.']
  implementation_cost decimal(15,2) [note: 'Capital cost required to implement the initiative.']
  initiative_type varchar [note: 'Category of the initiative, e.g., fuel switching, electrification, renewable energy procurement, low‑carbon concrete mix, modal shift in logistics, or building fabric improvement.']
  measurement_method varchar [note: 'Method used to obtain carbon reduction figures.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplementary information or comments.']
  payback_period_years decimal(5,2) [note: 'Estimated number of years required for the initiative to recoup its implementation cost through carbon savings.']
  projected_annual_co2e_saving decimal(12,3) [note: 'Estimated annual carbon dioxide equivalent reduction expected from the initiative, expressed in metric tonnes.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'End date of the reporting period for which savings are calculated.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Start date of the reporting period for which savings are calculated.']
  risk_assessment varchar [note: 'Brief summary of identified risks and mitigation measures for the initiative.']
  sponsor varchar [note: 'Name of the internal business unit or executive champion sponsoring the initiative.']
  start_date date [note: 'Planned or actual start date of the initiative.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the initiative record.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date on which verification was completed.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Status of third‑party verification of the reported savings.']
  verified_by varchar [note: 'Name of the organization or auditor that performed verification.']

  Note: 'Master record for a discrete carbon reduction initiative or decarbonization project being implemented at project or corporate level. Captures initiative name, initiative type (fuel switching, electrification of plant, renewable energy procurement, low-carbon concrete mix, modal shift in logistics, building fabric improvement), projected annual CO2e saving (tCO2e), implementation cost (£), payback period, status (proposed/approved/in-progress/completed), and actual CO2e saving achieved. Supports PAS 2080 carbon management in infrastructure.'
}

Table sustainability.emission_source {
  emission_source_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for emission_source']
  parent_emission_source_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on emission_source (parent_emission_source_id)']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first created in the system.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system of record for the emission source data.']
  default_emission_factor decimal(12,6) [note: 'Default emission factor (kg CO2e per unit activity) used when a specific factor is not provided.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the emission source record becomes effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the emission source record is no longer effective (if applicable).']
  greenhouse_gas varchar [note: 'Primary greenhouse gas emitted by the source. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: CO2|CH4|N2O|SF6|HFCs|PFCs|Other — promote to reference product]']
  is_regulated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the emission source is subject to regulatory reporting requirements.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the emission source (e.g., Diesel Generator, Concrete Mix).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or additional information about the emission source.']
  region varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 country code where the emission source is located.']
  regulatory_framework varchar [note: 'Regulatory regime governing reporting for this emission source.']
  scope varchar [note: 'GHG accounting scope applicable to the emission source.']
  source_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the emission source by activity type.']
  source_code varchar [note: 'External or industry code identifying the emission source.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the emission source.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Measurement unit associated with the emission factor.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for emission_source. Referenced by emission_source_id.'
}

Table sustainability.waste_carrier {
  waste_carrier_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for waste_carrier']
  parent_waste_carrier_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on waste_carrier (parent_waste_carrier_id)']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the carrier\'s street address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the carrier\'s street address (optional).']
  audit_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score resulting from the latest compliance audit (0‑100).']
  average_response_time_minutes varchar [note: 'Typical time from service request to carrier dispatch, in minutes.']
  billing_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the billing address for invoicing.']
  billing_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the billing address (optional).']
  billing_city varchar [note: 'City component of the billing address.']
  billing_country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code for the billing address.']
  billing_postal_code varchar [note: 'ZIP/postal code for the billing address.']
  billing_state varchar [note: 'State or province component of the billing address.']
  capacity_tons_per_day decimal(10,2) [note: 'Maximum amount of waste the carrier can move per day, expressed in metric tons.']
  carbon_emission_factor decimal(8,4) [note: 'Estimated CO₂ emissions per ton of waste transported (kg CO₂/ton).']
  carrier_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the carrier based on ownership and business model.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the carrier is located.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance standing with environmental regulations.']
  contract_end_date date [note: 'Date when the service contract with the carrier expires or is scheduled for renewal.']
  contract_start_date date [note: 'Date when the service contract with the carrier becomes effective.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the carrier\'s primary location.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the carrier record was first created.']
  fleet_size varchar [note: 'Number of vehicles owned or contracted for waste transport.']
  insurance_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the carrier\'s liability insurance expires.']
  insurance_policy_number varchar [note: 'Policy number for liability insurance covering waste transport.']
  last_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance audit.']
  license_number varchar [note: 'Government‑issued license identifier authorizing waste transport.']
  name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the waste carrier organization.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information about the carrier.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Standard payment condition agreed with the carrier.']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Regulatory permit number for handling specific waste categories.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code of the carrier\'s primary address.']
  primary_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address for the carrier\'s primary contact.']
  primary_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the main point of contact for the carrier.']
  primary_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number for the carrier\'s primary contact.']
  rating_date date [note: 'Date when the most recent rating was recorded.']
  rating_score decimal(3,2) [note: 'Overall performance rating assigned by the organization (0‑5).']
  region_served varchar [note: 'Geographic region(s) where the carrier provides services.']
  state varchar [note: 'State or province of the carrier\'s primary address.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the carrier.']
  tax_number varchar [note: 'Government tax identification number for the carrier.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the carrier record.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Primary type of vehicles used by the carrier.']
  waste_type_allowed varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of waste categories the carrier is authorized to transport. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: hazardous|medical|industrial|construction|organic|radioactive|e‑waste|asbestos — promote to reference product]']

  Note: 'Master reference table for waste_carrier. Referenced by carrier_id.'
}

Table sustainability.disposal_facility {
  disposal_facility_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for disposal_facility']
  parent_disposal_facility_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on disposal_facility (parent_disposal_facility_id)']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the facility\'s street address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the facility\'s street address, if applicable.']
  capacity_tons decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum waste volume the facility can accept, expressed in metric tons.']
  carbon_emission_kg_per_year decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total CO₂ equivalent emissions generated by the facility each year.']
  certification varchar [note: 'Environmental management certification held by the facility.']
  certification_date date [note: 'Date when the current certification was awarded.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the facility is located.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary facility contact.']
  contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary person responsible for facility communications.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the primary facility contact.']
  country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the facility resides.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the facility record was first created in the system.']
  current_utilization_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Current usage of the facility\'s capacity as a percentage.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of the facility\'s capabilities and characteristics.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the facility became operational or the record became effective.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the facility ceased operation or the record is no longer effective (nullable).']
  emergency_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the person to contact in case of an emergency at the facility.']
  emergency_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number for the emergency contact.']
  facility_code varchar [note: 'External business code used to reference the facility in contracts and reports.']
  facility_type varchar [note: 'Category describing the primary waste handling capability of the facility.']
  hazardous_material_handling boolean [note: 'True if the facility is equipped and permitted to handle hazardous waste.']
  landfill_gas_capture boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility captures landfill gas for energy or flaring.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent regulatory or internal inspection.']
  latitude double [note: 'Geographic latitude of the facility (decimal degrees).']
  longitude double [note: 'Geographic longitude of the facility (decimal degrees).']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the disposal facility.']
  operating_hours varchar [note: 'Standard daily operating hours (e.g., "08:00-17:00").']
  owner_organization varchar [note: 'Name of the organization that owns or operates the facility.']
  permit_expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the primary permit expires.']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the primary operating permit.']
  permits_required varchar [note: 'List of regulatory permits the facility must maintain.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal code for the facility address.']
  public_accessible boolean [note: 'True if the facility allows public drop‑off of waste.']
  regulatory_agency varchar [note: 'Primary government agency overseeing the facility\'s compliance.']
  safety_incident_reporting boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the facility reports safety incidents to regulatory bodies.']
  state varchar [note: 'State or province of the facility location.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the disposal facility.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the facility record.']
  waste_diversion_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of incoming waste diverted from landfill to recycling or reuse.']
  waste_processed_tons_year decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total amount of waste processed by the facility in a calendar year.']
  waste_type_accepted varchar [note: 'Categories of waste the facility is authorized to receive.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for disposal_facility. Referenced by disposal_facility_id.'
}
